violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Dough roller and mixer (need to be cleaned nightly) reachin cooler interiors pizza prep top and microwave interior noted not properly maintained.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Shelves and racks reachin cooler exteriors and other equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
PLUMBING SYSTEM (1 pts): Hand sink needs to be resealed to wall.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor walls and some ceiling tiles in the kitchen noted needs repair and/or replacing. | FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls throughout establishment under and around in place equipment and in areas of moisture noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Top lid on flour containers counter edges by swing door and reachin cooer (White stand up cooler) door handle noted not in good repair.
POISONS/TOXIC MATERIALS AND MEDICINE (3 pts): Chemical bottles noted not labeled in food prep area.

INSECT RODENT ANIMAL CONTROL (3 pts): Dead or trapped pests/insects noted not being removed from the establishment in a timely manner. Fly strips noted with flies on them and hanging in and around food prep areas. Do not use Fly strips in food prep areas. Strips removed
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Reachin cooler interiors pizza prep top and mixer noted not properly maintained.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Shelves and racks reachin cooler exteriors and other equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor walls and some ceiling tiles in the kitchen noted needs repair and/r replacing. | FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls throughout establishment noted in need of cleaning.
